description: FrontierFuse orchestrator-mode workflow guardrail + frozen snapshot-bound verifier. Inert unless a session is armed via `frontier-dispatch arm --gate "…"` (host freezes verifier argv/cwd); honours FRONTIER_GUARDS_OFF=1 / CLAUDE_GUARDS_OFF=1. Not a sandbox. PreToolUse matcher covers all tools so armed policy can fail closed outside the explicit read-only allowlist. Handlers use official Claude Code exec form (command + args; no shell).
